TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Song Congcian foksi == Song Congcian (Inkiris: Duncan Ferguson, 1860 miheca 12 folad 30 romi'ad—1923 miheca 3 folad 15 romi'ad ), nai Scotland a singkiwsi no Taywan Keristo ciwlo kiwkay. Ona lecadan ni Tomas Pakeli foksi (Thomas Barclay) i Yiwiy kalaloodan mikerid to sofitay no Dipong micomod to Taynanfo niyaro'. Kasofocan I 'ayaw, tona awaay ko harateng ni Song Congcian to sakala tintosi a tayal, nika itira i kalitemoh to macodahay to pitoor a foksi a mafiyol, ikor i Daykako ato kawasan a pitilid a mala singkiwsi. I 1889 miheca, ci Song Congcian maocor tayra i Taynan ta misarocod minanam to sowal no Payrang, kinapinapina mililis to kako kiwkay no niyaro'. Ikor, tayra cingra i Posong misolap to kiwkay, pinakayan i makowang no yincumin finacadan, nika caay ka semer to patay a madoka'. I 1895 miheca Yiwiy laloodan i, Taynanfo niyaro' a sofitay i pilood no Dipong itira i Ecenhang 'alo sa'icel sa milaliw; oya niyaro'ay 'alomanay tadamanay tamdaw ato malali'acaay tamdaw o saka ecaaw ka piri'ang no mitakaway tamdaw, nanoya miocor to pinapina a singkiwsi no kiwkay patorod to sakaeca ka picalap no sofitay no Dipong a milongoc sawad. Ikor, ci Song Congcian aci Tomas Pakeli a foksi mihawikid to tilid a tayra ici Nogi Maresukean, saka tosa romi'ad mikerid to sofitay no Dipong micomod to Taynan niyaro'; tatosaay foksi nanoya sa i 1897 miheca 4 foladmapatamohong to kompay cangra tatosa. I 1896 miheca 1 folad, ci Song Congcian, Mei Cianwu, Lan Daifi misolap to sapapatireng to isingan a tayra i Canghua sa'etal. Rama i, ci Song Congcian misolap to kiwkay mipatado misolimet to sakidafong no kiwkay, malacitodongay to "Taywanfo niyaro' sinpon no kiwkay a citodongay, mala 'a'isidan no congsie. Masarocod cingra to pipatireng t ociwkay lomaoc, ikor mapatireng to ko sakalaoc. I 1908 miheca 12 folad 30 romi'ad, Taynan kiwsikay matahidang no Dansui kiwsikay, patodongan ci Song Congcian saka 2 miheca 1 folad tayra i 'amisan mikerid to piseking ci Liu Zhongjian to saraskatay pitaneng t osowal . 1921 miheca, malaliyaw ko adada ni Song Congcian pahanhan to 1 miheca. I 1923 miheca 3 folad 15 romi'ad, mapatay i Inkiris ci Song Congcian . Laloma'an Maocor to saka 2 tayni i Taywan ci Song Congcian ato Elizabeth Song mararamod; I pihakelong ningra to fa'inay misarocod mipaising ato micikeroh fafahiyan salongoc . I 1901 miheca, mapatay i singlo isingan ci Elizabeth Song. I 1910 miheca, ci fafahi ci Song Congcian ci Yu kayingan . Tatolo ko wawa ni Song Congcian ato fafahi nangra : o kaka fa'inayan madoka' a mapatay, saka 2 wawa ira i Canada malali'acaay ko tayal, o wawa to fafahiyan ci Hazel Lombay Ferguson itira i Tiberias kiwkayan isingan malakongkoho ko tayal . Pinengnengan to tilid
S.PHON: == so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian fo~uksi == so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian (inkiris: ɬ~ɮo~u~unʦan fər*o~u~uso~un, **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ***** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ), nai sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ a siŋkiwsi no~u tajwan kəristo~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj. o~una ɾəʦaɬ~ɮan ni to~umas pakəɾi fo~uksi (tħo~umas b~b~varʦɾaj) i jiwij kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u tajnanfo~u nijaro~uʡ. kaso~ufo~uʦan i ʡajaw, to~una awaaj ko~u ħaratəŋ ni so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian to~u sakaɾa tinto~usi a tajaɾ, nika itira i kaɾitəmo~uħ to~u maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj to~u pito~uo~ur a fo~uksi a mafijo~uɾ, iko~ur i ɬ~ɮajkako~u ato~u kawasan a pitiɾiɬ~ɮ a maɾa siŋkiwsi. i **** miħəʦa, ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian mao~uʦo~ur tajra i tajnan ta misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u pajraŋ, kinapinapina miɾiɾis to~u kako~u kiwkaj no~u nijaro~uʡ. iko~ur, tajra ʦiŋra i po~uso~uŋ miso~uɾap to~u kiwkaj, pinakajan i mako~uwaŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nika ʦaaj ka səmər to~u pataj a maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ. i **** miħəʦa jiwij ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan i, tajnanfo~u nijaro~uʡ a so~ufitaj i piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itira i əʦənħaŋ ʡaɾo~u saʡiʦəɾ sa miɾaɾiw; o~uja nijaro~uʡaj ʡaɾo~umanaj taɬ~ɮamanaj tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u maɾaɾiʡaʦaaj tamɬ~ɮaw o~u saka əʦaaw ka piriʡaŋ no~u mitakawaj tamɬ~ɮaw, nano~uja mio~uʦo~ur to~u pinapina a siŋkiwsi no~u kiwkaj pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u sakaəʦa ka piʦaɾap no~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miɾo~uŋo~uʦ sawaɬ~ɮ. iko~ur, ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian aʦi to~umas pakəɾi a fo~uksi miħawikiɬ~ɮ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ a tajra iʦi no~u*i marəso~u~ukəan, saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u tajnan nijaro~uʡ; tato~usaaj fo~uksi nano~uja sa i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮmapatamo~uħo~uŋ to~u ko~umpaj ʦaŋra tato~usa. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian, məi ʦianwo~u~u, ɾan ɬ~ɮaifi miso~uɾap to~u sapapatirəŋ to~u isiŋan a tajra i ʦaŋħo~u~ua saʡətaɾ. rama i, ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian miso~uɾap to~u kiwkaj mipataɬ~ɮo~u miso~uɾimət to~u sakiɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u kiwkaj, maɾaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u "tajwanfo~u nijaro~uʡ sinpo~un no~u kiwkaj a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, maɾa ʡaʡisiɬ~ɮan no~u ʦo~uŋsiə. masaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra to~u pipatirəŋ t o~uʦiwkaj ɾo~umao~uʦ, iko~ur mapatirəŋ to~u ko~u sakaɾao~uʦ. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajnan kiwsikaj mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u ɬ~ɮanso~u~ui kiwsikaj, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian saka * miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ tajra i ʡamisan mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u pisəkiŋ ʦi ɾio~u~u *ħo~uŋjian to~u saraskataj pitanəŋ t o~uso~uwaɾ . **** miħəʦa, maɾaɾijaw ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ni so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian paħanħan to~u * miħəʦa. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mapataj i inkiris ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian . ɾaɾo~umaʡan mao~uʦo~ur to~u saka * tajni i tajwan ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian ato~u əɾi*ab~b~vətħ so~uŋ mararamo~uɬ~ɮ; i piħakəɾo~uŋ niŋra to~u faʡinaj misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ mipaisiŋ ato~u miʦikəro~uħ fafaħijan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ . i **** miħəʦa, mapataj i siŋɾo~u isiŋan ʦi əɾi*ab~b~vətħ so~uŋ. i **** miħəʦa, ʦi fafaħi ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian ʦi jo~u~u kajiŋan . tato~uɾo~u ko~u wawa ni so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian ato~u fafaħi naŋra : o~u kaka faʡinajan maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ a mapataj, saka * wawa ira i ʦanaɬ~ɮa maɾaɾiʡaʦaaj ko~u tajaɾ, o~u wawa to~u fafaħijan ʦi ħa*əɾ ɾo~umb~b~vaj fər*o~u~uso~un itira i tib~b~vərias kiwkajan isiŋan maɾako~uŋko~uħo~u ko~u tajaɾ . pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ
S.FORM: == Song Congcian foksi == Song Congcian (Inkiris: Duncan Ferguson, 1860 miheca 12 folad 30 romi'ad—1923 miheca 3 folad 15 romi'ad ), nai Scotland a singkiwsi no Taywan Keristo ciwlo kiwkay. Ona lecadan ni Tomas Pakeli foksi (Thomas Barclay) i Yiwiy kalaloodan mikerid to sofitay no Dipong micomod to Taynanfo niyaro'. Kasofocan I 'ayaw, tona awaay ko harateng ni Song Congcian to sakala tintosi a tayal, nika itira i kalitemoh to macodahay to pitoor a foksi a mafiyol, ikor i Daykako ato kawasan a pitilid a mala singkiwsi. I 1889 miheca, ci Song Congcian maocor tayra i Taynan ta misarocod minanam to sowal no Payrang, kinapinapina mililis to kako kiwkay no niyaro'. Ikor, tayra cingra i Posong misolap to kiwkay, pinakayan i makowang no yincumin finacadan, nika caay ka semer to patay a madoka'. I 1895 miheca Yiwiy laloodan i, Taynanfo niyaro' a sofitay i pilood no Dipong itira i Ecenhang 'alo sa'icel sa milaliw; oya niyaro'ay 'alomanay tadamanay tamdaw ato malali'acaay tamdaw o saka ecaaw ka piri'ang no mitakaway tamdaw, nanoya miocor to pinapina a singkiwsi no kiwkay patorod to sakaeca ka picalap no sofitay no Dipong a milongoc sawad. Ikor, ci Song Congcian aci Tomas Pakeli a foksi mihawikid to tilid a tayra ici Nogi Maresukean, saka tosa romi'ad mikerid to sofitay no Dipong micomod to Taynan niyaro'; tatosaay foksi nanoya sa i 1897 miheca 4 foladmapatamohong to kompay cangra tatosa. I 1896 miheca 1 folad, ci Song Congcian, Mei Cianwu, Lan Daifi misolap to sapapatireng to isingan a tayra i Canghua sa'etal. Rama i, ci Song Congcian misolap to kiwkay mipatado misolimet to sakidafong no kiwkay, malacitodongay to "Taywanfo niyaro' sinpon no kiwkay a citodongay, mala 'a'isidan no congsie. Masarocod cingra to pipatireng t ociwkay lomaoc, ikor mapatireng to ko sakalaoc. I 1908 miheca 12 folad 30 romi'ad, Taynan kiwsikay matahidang no Dansui kiwsikay, patodongan ci Song Congcian saka 2 miheca 1 folad tayra i 'amisan mikerid to piseking ci Liu Zhongjian to saraskatay pitaneng t osowal . 1921 miheca, malaliyaw ko adada ni Song Congcian pahanhan to 1 miheca. I 1923 miheca 3 folad 15 romi'ad, mapatay i Inkiris ci Song Congcian . Laloma'an Maocor to saka 2 tayni i Taywan ci Song Congcian ato Elizabeth Song mararamod; I pihakelong ningra to fa'inay misarocod mipaising ato micikeroh fafahiyan salongoc . I 1901 miheca, mapatay i singlo isingan ci Elizabeth Song. I 1910 miheca, ci fafahi ci Song Congcian ci Yu kayingan . Tatolo ko wawa ni Song Congcian ato fafahi nangra : o kaka fa'inayan madoka' a mapatay, saka 2 wawa ira i Canada malali'acaay ko tayal, o wawa to fafahiyan ci Hazel Lombay Ferguson itira i Tiberias kiwkayan isingan malakongkoho ko tayal . Pinengnengan to tilid
S.PHON: == so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian fo~uksi == so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian (inkiris: ɬ~ɮo~u~unʦan fər*o~u~uso~un, **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ***** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ), nai sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ a siŋkiwsi no~u tajwan kəristo~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj. o~una ɾəʦaɬ~ɮan ni to~umas pakəɾi fo~uksi (tħo~umas b~b~varʦɾaj) i jiwij kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u tajnanfo~u nijaro~uʡ. kaso~ufo~uʦan i ʡajaw, to~una awaaj ko~u ħaratəŋ ni so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian to~u sakaɾa tinto~usi a tajaɾ, nika itira i kaɾitəmo~uħ to~u maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj to~u pito~uo~ur a fo~uksi a mafijo~uɾ, iko~ur i ɬ~ɮajkako~u ato~u kawasan a pitiɾiɬ~ɮ a maɾa siŋkiwsi. i **** miħəʦa, ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian mao~uʦo~ur tajra i tajnan ta misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u pajraŋ, kinapinapina miɾiɾis to~u kako~u kiwkaj no~u nijaro~uʡ. iko~ur, tajra ʦiŋra i po~uso~uŋ miso~uɾap to~u kiwkaj, pinakajan i mako~uwaŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nika ʦaaj ka səmər to~u pataj a maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ. i **** miħəʦa jiwij ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan i, tajnanfo~u nijaro~uʡ a so~ufitaj i piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itira i əʦənħaŋ ʡaɾo~u saʡiʦəɾ sa miɾaɾiw; o~uja nijaro~uʡaj ʡaɾo~umanaj taɬ~ɮamanaj tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u maɾaɾiʡaʦaaj tamɬ~ɮaw o~u saka əʦaaw ka piriʡaŋ no~u mitakawaj tamɬ~ɮaw, nano~uja mio~uʦo~ur to~u pinapina a siŋkiwsi no~u kiwkaj pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u sakaəʦa ka piʦaɾap no~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miɾo~uŋo~uʦ sawaɬ~ɮ. iko~ur, ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian aʦi to~umas pakəɾi a fo~uksi miħawikiɬ~ɮ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ a tajra iʦi no~u*i marəso~u~ukəan, saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u tajnan nijaro~uʡ; tato~usaaj fo~uksi nano~uja sa i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮmapatamo~uħo~uŋ to~u ko~umpaj ʦaŋra tato~usa. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian, məi ʦianwo~u~u, ɾan ɬ~ɮaifi miso~uɾap to~u sapapatirəŋ to~u isiŋan a tajra i ʦaŋħo~u~ua saʡətaɾ. rama i, ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian miso~uɾap to~u kiwkaj mipataɬ~ɮo~u miso~uɾimət to~u sakiɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u kiwkaj, maɾaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u "tajwanfo~u nijaro~uʡ sinpo~un no~u kiwkaj a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, maɾa ʡaʡisiɬ~ɮan no~u ʦo~uŋsiə. masaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra to~u pipatirəŋ t o~uʦiwkaj ɾo~umao~uʦ, iko~ur mapatirəŋ to~u ko~u sakaɾao~uʦ. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajnan kiwsikaj mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u ɬ~ɮanso~u~ui kiwsikaj, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian saka * miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ tajra i ʡamisan mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u pisəkiŋ ʦi ɾio~u~u *ħo~uŋjian to~u saraskataj pitanəŋ t o~uso~uwaɾ . **** miħəʦa, maɾaɾijaw ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ni so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian paħanħan to~u * miħəʦa. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mapataj i inkiris ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian . ɾaɾo~umaʡan mao~uʦo~ur to~u saka * tajni i tajwan ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian ato~u əɾi*ab~b~vətħ so~uŋ mararamo~uɬ~ɮ; i piħakəɾo~uŋ niŋra to~u faʡinaj misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ mipaisiŋ ato~u miʦikəro~uħ fafaħijan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ . i **** miħəʦa, mapataj i siŋɾo~u isiŋan ʦi əɾi*ab~b~vətħ so~uŋ. i **** miħəʦa, ʦi fafaħi ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian ʦi jo~u~u kajiŋan . tato~uɾo~u ko~u wawa ni so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian ato~u fafaħi naŋra : o~u kaka faʡinajan maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ a mapataj, saka * wawa ira i ʦanaɬ~ɮa maɾaɾiʡaʦaaj ko~u tajaɾ, o~u wawa to~u fafaħijan ʦi ħa*əɾ ɾo~umb~b~vaj fər*o~u~uso~un itira i tib~b~vərias kiwkajan isiŋan maɾako~uŋko~uħo~u ko~u tajaɾ . pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ
